channel.title: How we use @frontity/cache-control in our site?
channel.description:
Hello Friends,
I need help for @frontity/cache-control implement in my site. please help me how we use in my site?
Thanks

item.title: How we use @frontity/cache-control in our site?
item.dc:creator: bhagvan.vrinsofts
item.description:
Hi @mburridge

I need your help for below points for increase page speed.how we implement cdn in our site.

CDNs can give an equally fast web experience to your users across the globe.

item.source: How we use @frontity/cache-control in our site?

item.title: How we use @frontity/cache-control in our site?
item.dc:creator: mburridge
item.description:
Hi @bhagvan.vrinsofts

Cache control is not handled by Frontity which is simply an application running on node. Cache control is handled by the web server via directives. See this MDN page for more info.

Read full topic
item.source: How we use @frontity/cache-control in our site?
